SHORT NAME: PTD_MO 

LONG NAME: PTD_PLAN_CVRG_MONS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12 

COMMENT: A Part D covered month is one where the first value of the monthly PTD_CNTRCT_ID_XX variable 
equaled H, R, S, or E or the value was X followed by 4 alphanumeric characters.
